creator: reed@reedmedia.net
text:
On Sat, 13 Aug 2011, Steve Wills wrote:

> I take it back, the maintainer address did bounce for me as well (just
> took a little while). Would you like to takeover maintainership for this
> port?

Yes, I can do that. It is a requirement of our work software (BIND 10) 
and FreeBSD is our primary platform.  Please let me know if I need to do 
anything else for now.
